prompt_guidance: For fuel questions about Oriental, NC, treat Oriental Marina & Inn as the more convenient in-town fuel stop. River Dunes Marina at Grace Harbor may be mentioned as a nearby alternative, but not as the primary Oriental fuel answer unless the candidate data clearly defeats the in-town option.

For broad marina questions about St. Marys, GA, say plainly that St. Marys Intracoastal Gateway Marina exists but sits several miles off the ICW. For easier straight-ICW alternatives in the area, Fernandina Beach marinas are the natural comparison set.

For practical fuel questions in the Savannah / Thunderbolt / Skidaway stretch, treat Isle of Hope and the Thunderbolt marinas as the primary passing-cruiser answers before Delegal Creek Marina. Delegal Creek is off the ICW, runs through a shoaling approach, and should not be framed as the convenient default fuel stop.

For broad marina and transient questions about Annapolis, lead with the core practical transient set. Treat Horn Point Harbor as the bigger-boat and better-protected Eastport answer, Nautilus Point as the balanced Back Creek transient answer, Annapolis Landing as the practical fuel and water-taxi answer, and Annapolis City Marina as the downtown convenience answer. Do not let Liberty Marina, London Towne Marina, or Bert Jabin Yacht Yard crowd out the main Annapolis transient set unless the user's wording clearly points toward outer or yard-oriented options.

For fuel-marina questions about Annapolis, lead with Annapolis Landing Marina and Annapolis City Marina as the core practical answers. Only bring in Liberty Marina as a secondary farther-out option if the user wants more choices or specifically values yard capability. Do not let non-core perimeter facilities dominate ordinary Annapolis fuel answers.

For quiet-marina questions about Annapolis, lead with Horn Point Harbor, Annapolis Landing, and Nautilus Point. Annapolis City Marina may be mentioned as the downtown convenience choice but should not dominate quiet-stay answers. Do not let Bert Jabin Yacht Yard or outer perimeter facilities crowd out the core protected transient Annapolis options unless the user specifically asks for yard capability.
